name: pokemon-dealer-os
description: Command centre for running a Pokémon card dealing business: value, stock, price, list, sell, book profit.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/lib/comps/cleaning.test.ts src/lib/comps/currency.test.ts src/lib/comps/pricing.test.ts src/lib/comps/compService.test.ts src/lib/comps/sources/pokemonPriceTracker.test.ts src/lib/comps/sources/pokeTrace.test.ts src/lib/comps/sources/pokemonTcgMarket.test.ts src/lib/comps/sources/ownedSales.test.ts src/lib/catalog/cardSearch.test.ts src/lib/catalog/fuzzy.test.ts src/lib/catalog/pokemonTcgApi.test.ts src/lib/catalog/setCatalog.test.ts src/lib/inventory/prismaInventoryRepo.test.ts src/lib/comps/prismaCompResultRepo.test.ts src/lib/dealer/metrics.test.ts src/lib/dealer/tableControls.test.ts src/lib/alerts/repricing.test.ts src/lib/alerts/watchlist.test.ts src/lib/exports/csv.test.ts src/lib/snapshots/portfolio.test.ts src/lib/automation/cronAuth.test.ts
